title: Smart approaches in integrated pest management (IPM)
subtitle: Chytré přístupy v integrované ochraně rostlin (IPM)
description: A guide on implementing smart technologies in Integrated Pest Management (IPM) for vegetable crops to enhance pest monitoring, prediction and environmentally responsible pest control. It also examines EU policy drivers such as the Sustainable Use Directive and the Green Deal and describes innovations like automated pheromone traps and drone-based spectral analysis.
